det_check_template:
proof fn det_remove_mapping_4k_helper1(pre_self_: PageAllocator, target_ptr: PagePtr, pcid: Pcid, va: VAddr, post1_self_: PageAllocator, r1: (), post2_self_: PageAllocator, r2: ())
    requires (pre_self_.wf()), (pre_self_.mapped_pages_4k().contains(target_ptr)), (pre_self_.page_mappings(target_ptr).contains((pcid, va))), (pre_self_.page_array@[page_ptr2page_index(target_ptr) as int].is_io_page == true), (pre_self_.page_array@[page_ptr2page_index(target_ptr) as int].ref_count == 1),
    ensures
        ({
            &&& (post1_self_.wf())
            &&& (post1_self_.allocated_pages_4k() =~= pre_self_.allocated_pages_4k())
            &&& (post1_self_.allocated_pages_2m() =~= pre_self_.allocated_pages_2m())
            &&& (post1_self_.allocated_pages_1g() =~= pre_self_.allocated_pages_1g())
            &&& (forall|p: PagePtr|
                post1_self_.page_is_mapped(p) && p != target_ptr ==> post1_self_.page_mappings(p) =~= pre_self_.page_mappings(p) && post1_self_.page_io_mappings(p) =~= pre_self_.page_io_mappings(p))
            &&& (post1_self_.page_mappings(target_ptr) =~= pre_self_.page_mappings(target_ptr).remove(
                (pcid, va),
            ))
            &&& (post1_self_.page_io_mappings(target_ptr) =~= pre_self_.page_io_mappings(target_ptr))
            &&& (post1_self_.container_map_2m@ =~= pre_self_.container_map_2m@)
            &&& (post1_self_.container_map_1g@ =~= pre_self_.container_map_1g@)
            &&& (post1_self_.container_map_4k@ =~= pre_self_.container_map_4k@.insert(
                pre_self_.page_array@[page_ptr2page_index(
                    target_ptr,
                ) as int].owning_container.unwrap(),
                pre_self_.container_map_4k@[pre_self_.page_array@[page_ptr2page_index(
                    target_ptr,
                ) as int].owning_container.unwrap()].remove(target_ptr),
            ))
            &&& (post2_self_.wf())
            &&& (post2_self_.allocated_pages_4k() =~= pre_self_.allocated_pages_4k())
            &&& (post2_self_.allocated_pages_2m() =~= pre_self_.allocated_pages_2m())
            &&& (post2_self_.allocated_pages_1g() =~= pre_self_.allocated_pages_1g())
            &&& (forall|p: PagePtr|
                post2_self_.page_is_mapped(p) && p != target_ptr ==> post2_self_.page_mappings(p) =~= pre_self_.page_mappings(p) && post2_self_.page_io_mappings(p) =~= pre_self_.page_io_mappings(p))
            &&& (post2_self_.page_mappings(target_ptr) =~= pre_self_.page_mappings(target_ptr).remove(
                (pcid, va),
            ))
            &&& (post2_self_.page_io_mappings(target_ptr) =~= pre_self_.page_io_mappings(target_ptr))
            &&& (post2_self_.container_map_2m@ =~= pre_self_.container_map_2m@)
            &&& (post2_self_.container_map_1g@ =~= pre_self_.container_map_1g@)
            &&& (post2_self_.container_map_4k@ =~= pre_self_.container_map_4k@.insert(
                pre_self_.page_array@[page_ptr2page_index(
                    target_ptr,
                ) as int].owning_container.unwrap(),
                pre_self_.container_map_4k@[pre_self_.page_array@[page_ptr2page_index(
                    target_ptr,
                ) as int].owning_container.unwrap()].remove(target_ptr),
            ))
        }) ==> det_remove_mapping_4k_helper1_equal(r1, r2, post1_self_, post2_self_),
{
{ASSUMES}}
